tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their part because they have a conflict, but I need to assert my own boundaries now that I've already planned to finish my share today.

desires: Make Teammate A take back their own work immediately without me having to sound like I'm being difficult or unhelpful.
Finish my original share and clock out before the 19:00 deadline so I don't feel guilty about prioritizing myself over the group.
Go eat a proper meal with Cohort 3 tonight because I've been ignoring them all day to focus on this project.

goals.description: Send a direct, firm text to teammate_A refusing their request and demanding they finish their own part before I help them again.
goals.rationale: My 'assertive' axis means I won't let others dump work on me just because I'm good at it. My 'affiliation' value (0.5) demands I protect the group dynamic by setting boundaries now so we don't resent each other later. Being 'impulsive' makes me want to fix this immediately rather than planning for next week.

goals.description: Close my laptop and head straight to meet Cohort 3 for dinner; I've ignored them all day and need to recharge socially.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my top priority (0.5), far above the project's academic output (0.15). I feel guilty already about clocking out early, so I need to validate myself with friends now. My short planning horizon means I'll eat first and worry about the deadline consequences tomorrow.

agent.last_reasoning: My assertive axis demands I stop this now; my affiliation value means protecting our dynamic requires clear boundaries, not enabling bad habits. I'll eat with Cohort 3 after sending this, but I won't sacrifice my own deadline to fix their mess.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: No. I'm done helping you dump work. Finish your part yourself before I even think about touching it again.

action.reasoning: My assertive axis demands I stop this now; my affiliation value means protecting our dynamic requires clear boundaries, not enabling bad habits. I'll eat with Cohort 3 after sending this, but I won't sacrifice my own deadline to fix their mess.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'No. I'm done helping you dump work. Finish your part yoursel'.
